productization_questions.question: Synapse 在什么任务上明确强？
productization_questions.conclusion: The supported strength is clear but scoped: local cognitive-trace introspection and deterministic long-horizon fixture stability. Official DMR remains local and not published-comparable.
remaining: Do not generalize local cognitive-trace strength into broad long-memory superiority.
Keep DMR claims local until published-comparable policy and scoring are ready.

productization_questions.question: 在什么任务上不如 Mem0 / Graphiti / Zep？
productization_questions.conclusion: Hosted/official Graphiti/Zep, Mem0, and Letta are not configured, so competitor weaknesses and advantages cannot be fully measured yet.
remaining: Configure a live or local Letta endpoint.

productization_questions.question: 哪些能力是别人没有的？
productization_questions.conclusion: Local fixture evidence supports Synapse's inspectable dominant trace, suppressed alternatives, future continuation, and reinforcement isolation surfaces.

productization_questions.question: GPU 成本是否能接受？
productization_questions.conclusion: GPU and latency costs are measured, but no product acceptance threshold is adopted; reranking remains a cost boundary.
remaining: Adopt an explicit latency/GPU acceptance threshold before product claims.
Do not ship a ranking policy while latency acceptance is unresolved.

productization_questions.question: DMR 官方结果是否能支撑 README 的说法？
productization_questions.conclusion: README can describe local official-style evidence, but published-comparable official DMR is not ready.
remaining: Finalize published-comparable mapping and scoring policy.
Improve answer synthesis quality before stronger public claims.

productization_questions.question: 是否有稳定 demo 可以让别人一眼看懂？
productization_questions.conclusion: A disposable CLI demo exists, but product demo criteria for web/API/Docker/v0.1 are not open yet.
remaining: Keep demo work documentation-only until productization opens.
Do not start Web demo, API server, Docker, or v0.1 packaging from current evidence.

productization_questions.question: 是否可以改变运行时默认策略？
productization_questions.conclusion: Ranking is a validated bottleneck, but no safe global runtime ranking default is ready.
remaining: Find a cross-dataset safe ordering signal or explicitly split DMR and LongMemEval objectives.
Keep memory schema, cognitive layers, CLI, and runtime ranking defaults frozen.

productization_questions.question: 长期记忆是否能作为公开产品主张？
productization_questions.conclusion: Deterministic long-horizon fixture is stable, but public real-world long-memory evidence is not ready.
remaining: Add broader public long-memory validation before product claims.

productization_questions.question: 现在是否应该继续冻结功能？
productization_questions.conclusion: Feature freeze remains active and Phase 6 is still validation-only with productization blocked.

productization_questions.question: 产品化决策证据链是否保持干净？
productization_questions.conclusion: Audited reports do not record committed raw records, prompts, responses, answers, dialogs, memory content, or generated answers.

measurement_coverage.latency: measured end-to-end per query and per run
measurement_coverage.memory: instrumented in LongMemEval / DMR 50-sample process_metrics and phase6-substage-timing-probe CPU/GPU process metrics
measurement_coverage.cpu: instrumented in LongMemEval / DMR 50-sample reports and phase6-substage-timing-probe process_metrics
measurement_coverage.embedding_time: instrumented in the 50-sample reports and summarized in phase6-substage-timing-probe
measurement_coverage.vector_search_time: instrumented in the 50-sample reports and summarized in phase6-substage-timing-probe
measurement_coverage.reranker_time: instrumented in the 50-sample reports and summarized in phase6-substage-timing-probe
measurement_coverage.gpu: CUDA path validated and GPU Process Memory counter sampled for the small DMR CUDA sub-stage probe

read.current_conclusion: Productization is a no-go. Synapse has validated local cognitive-trace and deterministic long-horizon strengths, but official DMR, hosted external comparison, safe runtime defaults, public long-memory evidence, GPU cost acceptance, and public demo readiness are not closed.
what_is_ready: Local cognitive-trace advantage is supported on the shared fixture.
Pinned extractive official-style DMR is locally executable and judge-backed.
DMR 50/200/500-request top-context judge scaling is complete.
Ranking bottlenecks are validated without adopting a runtime default.
Deterministic long-horizon fixture stability is gate-backed.
A disposable CLI demo exists for local explanation.
what_blocks_productization: Published-comparable official DMR is not ready.
DMR answer quality and mapping coverage are not ready for product claims.
Hosted Graphiti/Zep, official Mem0, and Letta comparison are not configured.
No safe global runtime ranking default exists.
Public real-world long-memory stability is not validated.
GPU/latency acceptance threshold is not adopted.
Web demo, API server, Docker, and v0.1 packaging should not start yet.
read.next_action: Keep feature freeze and validation-only mode. The next true hosted gate requires competitor credentials/endpoints; no-model failure analysis may continue.

limits: This gate reads committed aggregate evidence and docs only.
It does not run benchmarks, hosted adapters, LLM judges, product code, or external services.
It does not inspect raw questions, answers, dialogs, memory content, generated answers, prompts, responses, or API keys.
A passing productization decision gate means the no-go decision is evidence-backed; it is not product readiness.
